item.title: New Farm Machine Meets the Field
item.description: A fresh machine is nice—until it meets the farm. Larson Farms puts the new ride to work and sees how it handles real field conditions.

media:content.media:title: New Farm Machine Meets the Field
media:content.media:description: A fresh machine is nice—until it meets the farm. Larson Farms puts the new ride to work and sees how it handles real field conditions.

item.title: Auction Day and the Drive Home
item.description: Auction day for Larson Farms. The drive was the easy part, and the real question is what follows home.

media:content.media:title: Auction Day and the Drive Home
media:content.media:description: Auction day for Larson Farms. The drive was the easy part, and the real question is what follows home.

item.title: Rock Picker Breakdowns on the Farm
item.description: A stubborn rock picker caused three breakdowns, but the crew kept going and got the job done.

media:content.media:title: Rock Picker Breakdowns on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A stubborn rock picker caused three breakdowns, but the crew kept going and got the job done.

item.title: Grain Cart Jam Turns Into a Bigger Fix
item.description: A simple grain cart jam turned into a more involved repair during harvest. Real field work means solving equipment problems fast and keeping the job moving.

media:content.media:title: Grain Cart Jam Turns Into a Bigger Fix
media:content.media:description: A simple grain cart jam turned into a more involved repair during harvest. Real field work means solving equipment problems fast and keeping the job moving.

item.title: Getting the 9750 STS Unstuck
item.description: A farm job took a bad turn fast, and the recovery got interesting as the crew worked to free the 9750 STS.

media:content.media:title: Getting the 9750 STS Unstuck
media:content.media:description: A farm job took a bad turn fast, and the recovery got interesting as the crew worked to free the 9750 STS.

item.title: A Week of Farm Work and Surprises
item.description: A quick recap of the good days, the bad days, and the part that didn’t see coming on the farm.

media:content.media:title: A Week of Farm Work and Surprises
media:content.media:description: A quick recap of the good days, the bad days, and the part that didn’t see coming on the farm.

item.title: Weekend Repair Work on the Farm
item.description: The weekend shifted to equipment repairs after the wrench came out, keeping the farm moving with hands-on work and practical problem-solving.

media:content.media:title: Weekend Repair Work on the Farm
media:content.media:description: The weekend shifted to equipment repairs after the wrench came out, keeping the farm moving with hands-on work and practical problem-solving.
